topic: 化工產業介紹、碳捕捉技術、MOF 材料、週末溫泉旅遊（Uzma）
notes:
自我介紹職業：化工產業分析師（chemical industry analyst），解釋研究院性質（非營利、財團法人）。
討論碳捕捉（carbon capture）技術，介紹 MOF（Metal-Organic Framework）材料—去年獲諾貝爾獎，可用於過濾碳、淨水等多種用途。
分享週末溫泉之旅：租 Airbnb、搭接駁車到山上餐廳欣賞夜景（night view），山谷（valley）中的村莊。

💡 老師 Uzma 提示：in the car（不是 on）、present perfect 用法

words.ex: The factory has high carbon emission levels.
Heavy industries emit large amounts of carbon dioxide.
Carbon capture technology is used to reduce CO2 emissions.
Metal-organic frameworks won the Nobel Prize last year.
Our company is a non-profit research organization.
We are a consortium that bridges industry and government.
Cement and steel are considered heavy industries.
This material can act as a filter to purify water.
The village is located in a valley surrounded by mountains.
We went up the mountain to see the beautiful night view.
You have to take a shuttle bus to reach the mountain restaurant.
That hot spring village is a popular tourist attraction.

corrections.wrong: Right now, it's on the car.
corrections.right: Right now, I'm in the car.

corrections.wrong: I'm the industry analyst about chemical industry.
corrections.right: I'm an industry analyst in the chemical industry.

corrections.wrong: I already do this work past two years.
corrections.right: I've been doing this work for the past two years.

corrections.wrong: it's very different to right now's work.
corrections.right: It's very different from my work right now.
Gain many experiences.

topic: 3D 列印火箭（Terran 1）閱讀討論、複合材料與航太應用（Jen）
notes:
閱讀 Engoo 文章：A 3D-printed rocket fails to reach orbit（Relativity Space 的 Terran 1）。
討論 3D 列印優點：輕量化、快速原型製作、降低成本、易於客製化。
延伸聊到複合材料（composite）= 碳纖維（carbon fiber）+ 高分子聚合物（polymer），已應用於部分電動車車體。
老師 Jen 曾在台灣鹿港教英文一年（Neuro Link English）。

💡 call off = 取消（片語動詞）
💡 startup 是名詞，不是動詞

words.ex: The rocket failed to reach orbit and crashed into the ocean.
They are going to launch their spacecraft into space.
Relativity Space is a startup founded by two young engineers.
Oxygen can ignite a fire.
They called off the launch attempt due to technical issues.
3D printing is cost-effective compared to traditional manufacturing.
3D printed parts can substitute traditional metal components.
Lighter materials reduce the amount of fuel an aircraft needs.
A composite of carbon fiber and polymer is lighter than metal.
Carbon fiber is strong but much lighter than steel.
Polymers are combined with carbon fiber to make composites.
Rapid prototyping is one advantage of 3D printing.
The first stage separated from the rocket as planned.

corrections.right: I am from Brazil. / I am in Brazil.

corrections.wrong: Hsinchu is stay in the North of Taiwan.
corrections.right: Hsinchu is in the north of Taiwan.

corrections.wrong: I have last chance to use English.
corrections.right: I have the last chance to use English.

corrections.wrong: Some of they are working the chemical industry.
corrections.right: Some of them are working in the chemical industry.
Some electric cars have already been used.

topic: 歐洲熱門旅遊國家 + 詞性複習（TJ）
notes:
閱讀 Engoo 文章：Which European countries are most popular with tourists?
重點：學習國家名稱（noun）vs 形容詞（adjective）的差別，複習八大詞性。

🇬🇧 英國組成：England、Scotland、Wales、Northern Ireland → 合稱 United Kingdom
📚 八大詞性：Nouns, Verbs, Adjectives, Adverbs, Prepositions, Pronouns, Conjunctions, Interjections

words.ex: Florence has many historic buildings.
You need waterproof shoes for this hike.
We stayed at a beach resort in Mexico.
She showed me the sights in Sydney.
My friend is constantly complaining about her boyfriend.
Overtourism has become a problem in Venice.
Europe is the world's most visited continent.
German culture is very interesting.
British people drink a lot of tea.
Italian food is very popular worldwide.

corrections.right: France and the UK（國名）/ French and British（形容詞）

topic: 《飛吧！熊鷹》紀錄片 + 台灣原住民文化（TJ）
notes:
介紹台灣紀錄片《飛吧！熊鷹》(Fly! Mountain Hawk Eagle)，討論熊鷹生態、瀕危狀況，以及原住民文化與保育的平衡。

💡 老師建議：口語很流暢，要開始注意詞性（parts of speech）！
📽️ 老師推薦：Planet Earth（兩季）
🇹🇼 你推薦老師：《看見台灣》Beyond Beauty（YouTube 可看）

words.ex: The wingspan of this eagle is almost 116 cm.
This documentary is about an endangered species.
It's a documentary about eagles in Taiwan.
A university teacher is called a professor.
These eagles are an endangered species.
Indigenous people use feathers to show their royalty.
The feather is just a symbol of royalty.
All proceeds will be used to protect these eagles.
The film's goal is to raise awareness about eagles.
The documentary covers the eagle's lifespan.
Eagles in Taiwan eat flying squirrels.
The Muntjac is a deer species found mainly in Taiwan.

corrections.right: bat（蝙蝠）或 flying squirrel（飛鼠）— 是不同動物！
feather（羽毛）
They won't attack unless they are hunting.

topic: MBTI、飲食習慣、平行宇宙與人生哲學（Lelo）
notes:
討論素食主義、純素、pescatarian 的差別。聊到 MBTI（Christine: ENTP，Lelo: INFJ），intuitive vs observant，abstract thinking，T vs F（reason/logic vs empathy）。延伸到 Type A/B、fortune-telling、predestination、parallel universes、FOMO、codependency。

💡 金句：It's better with you, not that I can't live without you.
💡 老師建議：在 YouTube 找喜歡主題的英語頻道，不要強迫自己

words.ex: King oyster mushrooms have a meaty texture.
My grandma is Buddhist and eats vegetarian food.
I mostly follow a vegetarian diet.
A plant-based diet means less meat, more vegetables.
Someone who eats seafood but not meat is pescatarian.
Vegans don't eat any animal products, including eggs.
Intuitive people tend to think abstractly.
Observant people describe exactly what they see.
N types in MBTI are known for abstract thinking.
F types tend to have strong empathy for others.

words.zh: A型（計畫型）/ B型（隨性型）人格
words.ex: Type A people plan every detail of their trips.
Fortune-telling is popular in Taiwan.
Do you believe in predestination or free will?
Nothing is set in stone — things can always change.
In a parallel universe, another version of you exists.
I feel FOMO knowing another me might be a billionaire.
Codependency means you can't function without someone.

corrections.right: I mostly follow a vegetarian diet（更自然）
pescatarian
cry in front of your friends
